mapper.insert: insert into aiw_ai_skill (biz_id, skill_code, skill_version, skill_name, skill_type, status, instruction_content, input_schema, output_schema, evaluation_policy, description, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by) values (#{bizId}, #{skillCode}, #{skillVersion}, #{skillName}, #{skillType}, #{status}, #{instructionContent}, #{inputSchema}, #{outputSchema}, #{evaluationPolicy}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}) on duplicate key update skill_name = values(skill_name), skill_type = values(skill_type), status = values(status), instruction_content = values(instruction_content), input_schema = values(input_schema), output_schema = values(output_schema), evaluation_policy = values(evaluation_policy), description = values(description), updated_at = values(updated_at), updated_by = values(updated_by)
mapper.select: select * from aiw_ai_skill where skill_code = #{skillCode} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by updated_at desc limit 1
